message.content:
Very thoroughly explore the frontend codebase to understand existing patterns. I need to understand:

1. Read client/API/Api.js - understand how API calls are made (auth headers, base URL, fetch patterns)
2. Read client/src/App.jsx - understand routing structure, lazy loading, and how LexicalComposer is set up
3. Read client/src/components/HomePage/Editor/ - understand how the editor component works with Lexical
4. Read client/src/components/HomePage/Sidebar/ or whatever sidebar component exists - understand navigation structure
5. Read any existing React Query hook (e.g. in client/src/) to understand the query/mutation patterns
6. Look at CSS files to understand the glass morphism + CSS variable patterns

Return the COMPLETE content of App.jsx, Api.js, and the sidebar component. For other files, return the key patterns and complete code snippets.
